purpose: Partner-facing second-level client list for reviewing downline client activity, status, upgrade readiness, and profile entry.

interactions.feedback: Show profile-opening toast and navigate to /client/{id}
interactions.recovery: If profile is unavailable, show not-found state on profile page

rules: Partner clients are visible only to partner role users.
Client data must remain marked as simulated until production permission, privacy, and audit controls exist.
Upgrade status must not be represented as approved until approval is complete.
Profile review is required before approving a pending upgrade request.
